_comment_universal: Pattern A — stdio proxy. Universally supported by every MCP client (Claude Desktop today, Cursor, Continue). The proxy holds OAuth credentials locally and exchanges them for short-lived JWTs.
_comment_direct_http: Pattern B — direct HTTP via the MCP Streamable HTTP transport at /mcp/rpc (MCP 2025-06-18). Use it when your client supports the streamable-http transport directly. As of 2026-04-30 not every desktop client speaks streamable-http natively, so Pattern A remains the safe default.

headers.Authorization: Bearer <static JWT or token issued by `make seed`>
